settings.ggB9Gp8U8JQ_childItem_0: What happened to Omnis? Why is it now SerlinoLab?
settings.ggB9Gp8U8JQ_childItem_4: How long does it take to see results?
settings.ggCdVdus-lO_text: If the product doesn't meet your expectations, you have up to 60 days to request a complete refund, without any complications.
settings.ggFipoBsWwP_text:
Morning and evening, after cleaning and drying your face, press the button located on the top of the bottle once and distribute the cream around the eye contour.

Using the metal ball massager, make circular movements until completely absorbed.
settings.ggKZrkCgfQz_text:
The SerlinoLab eye contour is the ideal solution for men who want to:

  • Prevent and reduce bags under the eyes
  • Eliminate unsightly dark circles
  • Appear more rested and in shape
settings.ggNgskm7d42_text:
Based on the experiences of multiple customers, you can already see the first results after the first days of use.

Like any investment though, give this product the benefit of time.

The best results are achieved with continued use, twice a day, for 8-12 weeks.
settings.ggR8kqovO2L_text: 1 eye contour lasts 1 month when used twice a day, morning and evening.
settings.ggVLmbUDTCI_text: "I've been using it for 2 weeks, a colleague asked me if I went on vacation... finally goodbye bags and dark circles!!"
settings.ggbsEHDd1cH_variantSelectionRequiredMess: Please select a variant to add product to cart
settings.gggTQ3oQA5C_text:
New: Omnis has become SerlinoLab.
Same formula, new look
settings.ggtTyjg3ZOP_text:
We updated our name and packaging to better reflect the true Italian identity of our brand.

 

The formulas? Exactly the same.

 

Same ingredients, same quality, same lab on the Amalfi Coast.

Just a new look.

 

We hope you like it as much as we do!

settings.ggNSUzac6Rj_text: "Made in Italy: SerlinoLab spopola tra gli uomini"
settings.ggmCNNZ_lrk_text:
"Made in Italy: 
SerlinoLab goes viral among men"

settings.ggLAWbyG0dw_text: Maximum effectiveness after 3 packages. Results may vary from person to person

settings.ggn_plRY9PV_text:
All SerlinoLab creams are Made in Italy, produced by a small family owned lab with 38 years of experience.

 

❌ You won’t find: silicones, parabens, alcohol, synthetic fragrances. And of course, we do NOT test on animals!

settings.gg2geC5QU78_text: More compact and toned skin in 2 weeks
settings.ggFuswS2tET_text: From the First Application, Softer and More Elastic Skin
settings.ggbtmoS_6pe_text:
From the First Application,
Softer and More Elastic Skin

settings.gg9vSbtTCtd_text: A Made in Italy formula that tackles the problem at its root
settings.ggIi2WelVfh_text:
A peptide that relaxes the muscles around the eyes, naturally softening expression lines.

 

BENEFITS:

  • Reduces crow's feet
  • Smooths fine lines
  • Visibly smoother skin
settings.ggOCBvCsSRm_text: AQUA [WATER], ALOE BARBADENSIS LEAF JUICE, GLYCERIN, SODIUM POLYACRYLATE, NIACINAMIDE, ORYZA SATIVA (RICE) BRAN OIL, PHENOXYETHANOL, CAFFEINE, TOCOPHERYL ACETATE, HELIANTHUS ANNUUS (SUNFLOWER) SEED OIL, UREA, TREHALOSE, HYDROLYZED RICE PROTEIN, VITIS VINIFERA (GRAPE) JUICE, ETHYLHEXYLGLYCERIN, CITRUS AURANTIUM BERGAMIA (BERGAMOT) FRUIT OIL, SODIUM CARBOXYMETHYL BETAGLUCAN, LINALYL ACETATE, LINALOOL, LIMONENE, CITRIC ACID, LAVANDULA ANGUSTIFOLIA (LAVENDER) OIL, ALTHAEA OFFICINALIS ROOT EXTRACT, CALENDULA OFFICINALIS FLOWER EXTRACT, MALVA SYLVESTRIS (MALLOW) LEAF EXTRACT, CAPRYLYL GLYCOL, HYDROXYETHYLCELLULOSE, POTASSIUM SORBATE, SODIUM BENZOATE, SODIUM HYALURONATE, BENZYL ALCOHOL, PINENE, ACETUM, BETA-CARYOPHYLLENE, TERPINEOL, ACETYL HEXAPEPTIDE-8, ASCORBIC ACID, PENTAPEPTIDE-18
settings.ggQcytW0Qx-_text:
A low molecular weight form that penetrates deeper than regular hyaluronic acid.

 

BENEFITS:

  • Penetrates deeply
  • Fills fine lines from within
  • Plumper, more hydrated skin
settings.ggb3Bc9Bfkr_text:
Rich in polyphenols and vitamin C, strengthens capillaries and brightens dark circles.

 

BENEFITS:

  • Brightens dark circles
  • Strengthens fragile capillaries
  • Illuminates the eye area
settings.ggcjHoeC6qt_text: Triple Action Against Bags, Dark Circles, and Wrinkles
settings.ggyEadoL8pn_text:
Stimulates microcirculation and constricts blood vessels, reducing puffiness under the eyes.

 

BENEFITS:

  • Reduces puffiness fast
  • Drains excess fluids
  • Fresher, more rested look

settings.gg4E8myjkrY_text:
NO at the moment the SerlinoLab Eye Contour is only available on our website.

 

We have chosen to sell only online to maintain competitive prices by avoiding intermediaries and offer a shopping experience with personalized advice for each customer on WhatsApp, which would not be possible in physical stores.
settings.gg7xPh9jIxj_text: If after 60 days you haven't seen the results you expected, you can write to us and you will be refunded 100%... yes we are that confident in our products!
settings.ggLeXHdEWgH_text: The SerlinoLab eye contour is made with the highest quality ingredients. Suitable for every skin type, even the most sensitive ones. Particularly recommended for mature skin.
settings.ggR0ua9eMRk_text: Like any investment, give this product the benefit of time. The best results are achieved with continued use, twice a day, for 8-12 weeks.

We updated our name and packaging to better reflect the true Italian identity of our brand.

 

The formulas? Exactly the same.

We hope you like it as much as we do
settings.ggnj2HWJKbX_text:
The main ingredients are hyaluronic acid, caffeine and acetyl hexapeptide-8.

You can find the complete list here:

INCI

Aqua, aloe barbadensis leaf juice, glycerin, sodium polyacrylate, niacinamide, oryza sativa bran oil, phenoxyethanol, caffeine, tocopheryl acetate, helianthus annuus seed oil, urea, trehalose, hydrolyzed rice protein, ethylhexylglycerin, citrus aurantium bergamia fruit oil, sodium carboxymethyl betaglucan, lavandula angustifolia oil, linalool, limonene, sodium benzoate, linalyl acetate, althaea officinalis root extract, calendula officinalis flower extract, malva sylvestris leaf extract, hydroxyethylcellulose, potassium sorbate, sodium hyaluronate, benzyl alcohol, caprylyl glycol, pinene, acetyl hexapeptide-8, ascorbic acid, citric acid, pentapeptide-18.
settings.ggwnWc2z9ft_text:
Morning and evening, after cleaning and drying your face, press the button located on the top of the bottle once and distribute the cream around the eye contour.

Using the metal ball massager, make circular movements until completely absorbed.

A single dose is enough for both eyes.
